description: Create a modern, minimalist corporate website for Representações Rodrigues (auto parts representation company). Use a color palette of gray, red, and brown as brand identity colors. Include a professional hero section with the company logo 'RR' and tagline about business partnerships. Design should be clean, professional, and B2B-focused.

Add 'A Empresa' section with company history (founded 1982 by Oswaldo Rodrigues dos Santos Filho, business administration graduate), along with three key pillars displayed in cards: Foco (building partnerships with new clients), Visão (be the main reference for partnerships in auto parts market), and Missão (represent industries with excellence through partnerships and differentiated service).

Create 'Nossa Equipe' team section displaying 5 team members with their photos and roles: Oswaldo Rodrigues (Diretor), Suely Rodrigues (Consultor comercial/MS), Matheus Rodrigues (Supervisor de vendas MS/MT), Érika Oliveira (Coord. Administrativo), Frank de Sá (Promotor Vendas/MT). Use circular photo frames and clean layout.

Build 'Nossas Indústrias' section displaying all 16 partner companies in an elegant grid: AutoImpact, DS Auto Parts, SLY Parts, RIC, Turotest, DS Agro, Florio, Platolândia, FirPar, Excelite, Rolt do Brasil, Weasler, Radiex, Sika. Each with logo and brief description of products. Make it interactive and visually appealing.

Create an interactive product catalog section that allows visitors to browse products by category (sensores, pistões, válvulas, embreagens, lâmpadas, etc.) with filtering and search functionality. Display product cards with images, descriptions, and related industry partner.
Add a downloads area section where visitors can access PDF catalogs from partner industries. Organize by company with download buttons and file size information. Include search functionality.
Create an interactive map showing the service coverage area in MS (Mato Grosso do Sul) and MT (Mato Grosso) states. Highlight key cities like Cuiabá and show the regional presence visually.

Build an advanced contact form section with fields for: name, email, phone, company, state (MS/MT dropdown), subject, and message. Include form validation and WhatsApp contact button. Display contact information: office address (Av. Historiador Rubens de Mendonça, 1731, Sala 1005, Cuiabá-MT, CEP 78.048-340), phones ((65) 3054-1819 MT, (67) 3384-4511 MS), and email (rodrigues@reprodrigues.com.br).
Add a footer with company information, quick links to all sections, social media links, and copyright notice (Softham Sistemas). Keep it minimal and professional matching the overall design.

Remake the entire website with a conservative, professional B2B design inspired by auto parts industry standards. Remove all decorative patterns (dots, geometric backgrounds, gradient overlays). Use a clean hero section with a real industrial photo background (engine parts, automotive components) with dark overlay and white text. Typography should be conservative and readable. Color palette: primarily grays (#2a2a2a to #f5f5f5), with tasteful red (#c41e3a) and brown (#6d4c41) accents. Design should feel trustworthy and established, not trendy.

Redesign the company section (A Empresa) with a simple two-column layout: left side with company text (founded 1982, Oswaldo Rodrigues story), right side with a professional office/team photo. Below that, show the three pillars (Foco, Visão, Missão) as simple white cards with icon, title, and description on a light gray background. No gradients, no animations except subtle hover effects.

Simplify the team section (Nossa Equipe) - display 5 team members in a clean grid with circular photo frames (simple border, no gradient), name below, and role. Use placeholder professional headshots. Background should be white or very light gray. Simple, traditional layout.

Redesign the industries section (Nossas Indústrias) as a clean grid of white cards on light gray background. Each card shows: company logo (centered), brief product description (2-3 lines), and a simple text link 'Saiba mais'. 4 columns on desktop, responsive. No fancy hover effects - just subtle shadow on hover. Display all 16 partner companies.

Simplify the product catalog - make it a clean filterable grid with category buttons at top (simple pills with border). Product cards should be white with photo, title, brief description, and related industry. No complex animations. Background light gray.
Redesign downloads section as a simple list/table view with company name, document title, file size, and download button. Clean, functional, no fancy design. White background.

Replace the interactive map with an embedded Google Maps iframe showing MT and MS states, with simple text above listing coverage areas and contact info for each state. Clean section with white background.

Simplify contact form - standard vertical form fields (name, email, phone, company, state dropdown, subject, message) with simple styling. Show contact details in a sidebar or cards below: address, phones, email. Include WhatsApp button. Light gray background for section, white form card.

Create a simple dark gray footer (#2a2a2a) with white text. Three columns: company info left, quick links center, contact info right. Copyright at bottom. No social media icons unless requested. Conservative and professional.

Update the header/hero section to use the official logo from /logo.png (replaces any placeholder). Add a subtle watermark pattern in the hero background: very large, semi-transparent 'RR' letters with opacity around 0.04, positioned elegantly behind the content. Should be barely visible but add a premium touch.

Update team section photos to use real images: Oswaldo Rodrigues uses /oswaldo.jpg, Suely Rodrigues uses /suely.jpg, Matheus Rodrigues uses /matheus.jpg, Érika Oliveira uses /erika.jpg, Frank de Sá uses /frank.jpg. Keep circular frames and existing layout. Photos are already cropped to show head and shoulders.

Completely redesign the team section (Nossa Equipe) with an elegant hierarchical layout using full-body photos. Create a premium design with: 1) Oswaldo Rodrigues (Diretor/Fundador) in a larger featured card on the left or center-top, using /oswaldo-full.jpg - make this card 50% larger than others with special styling to show he's the founder/owner. 2) The other 4 team members in smaller cards arranged elegantly around/below: Suely Rodrigues (Consultor comercial/MS) with /suely-full.jpg, Matheus Rodrigues (Supervisor de vendas MS/MT) with /matheus-full.jpg, Érika Oliveira (Coord. Administrativo) with /erika-full.jpg, Frank de Sá (Promotor Vendas/MT) with /frank-full.jpg. Use elegant card design with subtle shadows, the RR banner visible in photos adds authenticity. Consider a layout like: Oswaldo featured large on left, 4 team members in 2x2 grid on right. Or: Oswaldo centered top larger, 4 below in a row. Keep it conservative and professional - white cards on light gray background, clean typography.
